tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('sentry_issues','emails') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"WITH top AS (
  SELECT id, title FROM sentry_issues
  WHERE status = 'unresolved'
  ORDER BY count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body)
SELECT 'oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'Top error: ' || title FROM top
RETURNING id, to_addr, subject, body;"}
